svg.title: Table 2: List of 20 image-to-3D models evaluated in this study
svg.desc: List of 20 image-to-3D models with source category, ELO scores from 3D Arena leaderboard, and mesh count contributed to the analysis.
svg.text: Total: 20 models, 1,993 meshes · Source: Open-source 14, Commercial 3, Experimental 3
